description.value:
Nomad access 1.

Buggies are extremely common among nomad clans and raiders on the open roads, either starting their lives as luxury vehicles or being custom-built from scrap and spare parts. While their light weight doesn't offer much protection, it allows them to overtake a normal car easily, especially in the midwestern wastelands where upgraded suspension allows them to bounce over obstacles that would stop another vehicle cold.

Buggies have 2 seats, with a common upgrade being the addition of a third in the back for jumping into/out of, or for mounting a gun on. 25 MOVE / 125 MPH / 200 KPH top speed. 40 HP. 25,000eb (Super Luxury) item. Can mount terrain features of less than 24 IN/61 CM in height without needing to maneuver.

Tokens and Art by reddragon8928 on Discord. Redistributed with permission.
